scope: stable rule_id field on Finding with auto-fallback
per-path configuration overrides (exclude_signals, custom weights, severity_gate)
docs: troubleshooting guide, performance matrix, GitLab CI, Python API, check-vs-analyze
notes: Phase B+C of gap-analysis implementation plan.

rule_id defaults to signal_type.value via __post_init__ for backward compatibility.
Per-path overrides integrated into pipeline via apply_path_overrides after scoring.
